robots.name: Logo Maker
robots.description: Type your brand name, pick a font and style, download SVG instantly. No signup.

robots.name: Color Palette Generator
robots.description: Generate harmonious palettes. Complementary, analogous, triadic. Extract from image. A11y contrast check.

robots.name: Typography Pairing
robots.description: Find perfect font combinations. Preview in context, adjust sizing, export CSS with @import.

robots.name: Brand Kit Builder
robots.description: Assemble a complete brand guide: logo + colors + fonts + usage rules. Download as HTML.

robots.name: Business Card Designer
robots.description: Pick a template, enter your details, apply brand colors. Download print-ready SVG.

robots.name: Favicon Generator
robots.description: Letters or emoji to favicon. Multiple sizes (16-512px), SVG/PNG/ICO download, copy HTML tags.

robots.name: Image Resizer & Cropper
robots.description: Resize to Instagram, X, LinkedIn, YouTube dimensions. Custom crop, quality control, drag & drop.

robots.name: SVG Icon Library
robots.description: 200+ icons searchable by name. Customize color and size. Copy SVG or download.

robots.name: Social Media Templates
robots.description: Platform-sized templates for Instagram, X, LinkedIn. Edit text, colors, download PNG.

robots.name: OG Image Maker
robots.description: Generate Open Graph images for link previews. Blog, product, event templates. 1200x630 PNG.

robots.name: Gradient & Background Maker
robots.description: Linear, radial, conic gradients. Mesh backgrounds. Drag color stops, 24 presets, copy CSS, download PNG.

robots.name: Slide Deck Builder
robots.description: Build presentations with 6 slide types. Theme colors, reorder slides, export as self-contained HTML slideshow.

robots.name: Smart Color from Description
robots.description: Type a mood or scene — get a matching 5-color palette. "Sunset ocean" → warm pinks, deep blues.

robots.name: Smart Logo Concepts
robots.description: Enter brand name + industry. Get 6 unique procedural logos: geometric, monogram, spirograph, fractal.

robots.name: Background Remover
robots.description: Upload photo, AI removes the background. On-device model (RMBG-1.4) — images never leave your browser.

robots.name: Pitch Deck Generator
robots.description: Choose deck type (Startup/Sales/Investor), fill a form, get 10 pro slides auto-generated. Fullscreen present mode.

robots.name: Design Token Generator
robots.description: Pick colors + fonts → export as CSS vars, Tailwind, SCSS, JSON, Swift, Kotlin. Live component preview.

robots.name: Device Mockup Generator
robots.description: Upload screenshot, choose device (iPhone, MacBook, iPad, Watch). Adjust angle, shadow. Download PNG.

robots.name: QR Code Designer
robots.description: Generate QR codes with custom colors, corner styles, logo overlay. Download PNG or SVG.

robots.name: Wireframe Builder
robots.description: Drag-and-drop wireframe components. Snap to grid, resize, 3 page presets. Export SVG/PNG.

robots.name: Contrast Checker
robots.description: WCAG contrast ratio calculator. AA/AAA pass/fail, accessible alternatives, batch palette check.

robots.name: Pattern Generator
robots.description: Seamless patterns: dots, lines, waves, hexagons. Layers, 20 presets. Download SVG/PNG/CSS.

robots.name: Design Asset Library
robots.description: Browse, generate, upload, and download images, illustrations, icons, patterns, textures, backgrounds, and UI assets.

robots.name: Free Logo Templates
robots.description: 24+ customizable SVG logo templates. Edit text, colors, icons. Download instantly. Favorites saved locally.

robots.name: Personal Asset Manager
robots.description: Local-first design library. Upload, organize, tag, search, export. All stored on YOUR device (IndexedDB).

robots.name: Format Converter
robots.description: Convert between PNG, JPEG, WebP, AVIF, BMP, ICO, Base64, SVG trace. Batch mode, EXIF strip, DPI control.

robots.name: Tailwind Theme Builder
robots.description: Visual editor for tailwind.config.js. Colors with 50-950 scales, typography, spacing, shadows, breakpoints. Live preview.

robots.name: CSS Animation Studio
robots.description: Visual keyframe editor. Timeline, cubic-bezier curves, 20 presets. Preview + export @keyframes CSS.

robots.name: CSS Effects Generator
robots.description: Glassmorphism, neumorphism, multi-layer shadows, and gradient builder. Presets, live preview, copy CSS.

robots.name: Noise & Texture Generator
robots.description: Perlin, simplex, film grain, paper, fabric, concrete, wood, marble. Tileable PNG, CSS, SVG filter export.

robots.name: Micro-Interaction Library
robots.description: 100+ CSS animations: hover effects, spinners, transitions, attention seekers, buttons, text effects. Copy-paste.

robots.name: SVG Optimizer & Editor
robots.description: Clean, minify, and edit SVGs. Remove cruft, shorten IDs, change colors. Export as SVG, data URL, or React.

robots.name: Color Blindness Simulator
robots.description: Upload image → see through 8 types of color blindness. Palette checker, accessible alternatives.

robots.name: Avatar Generator
robots.description: 7 styles: initials, geometric, gradient, pixel art, pattern, rings, blob. Deterministic from name. Batch mode.

robots.name: UI Component Library
robots.description: 50+ copy-paste HTML/CSS components. Buttons, cards, forms, tables, modals. HTML, Tailwind, React JSX export.

robots.name: CSS Layout Builder
robots.description: Visual Grid + Flexbox editor. Drag cells, set fr/px/%, named areas. Export CSS, Tailwind, HTML.

robots.name: Form Builder
robots.description: Drag & drop form builder. 16 field types, multi-step wizards, 7 presets. Export HTML, Tailwind, React JSX.

robots.name: Landing Page Builder
robots.description: Stack 17 section types to build pages. Hero, features, pricing, FAQ, CTA. Responsive preview. Export HTML.

robots.name: Dashboard Builder
robots.description: Admin dashboard templates. Sidebar, charts, tables, widgets. Light/dark theme. Export HTML + React.

robots.name: Moodboard Builder
robots.description: Freeform canvas for visual inspiration. Drag images, colors, fonts, shapes. Export PNG.

robots.name: User Flow Builder
robots.description: Draw screen flows. 4 node types, bezier connections, labels, auto-layout, minimap. Export SVG/PNG.

robots.name: Sitemap Generator
robots.description: Visual page hierarchy tree. Drag to reparent, import URLs, export XML sitemap for SEO.

robots.name: Design Handoff Sheet
robots.description: Upload mockup, add measurement pins, extract colors, redlines. Export HTML specs for developers.

robots.name: Photo Editor
robots.description: Mini-Photoshop. 15 tools, layers, adjustments, clone stamp, blur, gradient. Undo/redo, keyboard shortcuts.

robots.name: Vector Editor
robots.description: Mini-Illustrator. Pen tool, shapes, bezier paths, layers, align/distribute. SVG-native. Export clean SVG/PNG.

robots.name: Pixel Art Editor
robots.description: Sprite editor with animation frames, onion skin, layers, mirror mode. Export PNG/spritesheet/GIF. 8-128px grids.

tools.name: AI Icon Set Generator
tools.description: Generate consistent SVG icon sets from a theme with a free AI model. Recolor, copy, download icons or a sprite.
